# ADR-001: Referring Choice

## Context

Doctor needs a referrer whose target changed later.

## Decision

Reference the sibling decision.

## Consequences

The drift phase flags this artifact as suspect.

## Status

Accepted

## Related Decisions

- adr-002

# ADR-002: Moving Target Choice

## Context

Doctor needs a target committed after its referrer.

## Decision

Change in a later commit.

## Consequences

The referrer becomes suspect.

## Status

Accepted
